# Q6 aggregate by action (core pattern) (composite field split)

**Dataset**: `gx_08_feed` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Split / parse composite delimited fields (split + arrayindex + to_number). Q6 aggregate by action (core pattern). `split()` carves the delimited field into an array, `arrayindex()` picks an element (negative index = from the end).

```sql
dataset = gx_08_feed | alter parts = split(combo, "|") | alter action = arrayindex(parts, 2), cnt = to_number(arrayindex(parts, 3)) | comp count() as events, sum(cnt) as total_count by action | sort desc total_count
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 4). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
